title: Add information about the configuration files to the install docs

comments.body: Attempting to improve install docs to solve problems like https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/810 where people just come to the github and compile for their native platform and end up being confused when all of the configuration files are not put in place.

Once we have this settled for Buildah will open a similar PR for podman.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @mheon
@LemonIceScream PTAL.  Would this document have helped you when you tried the tools out.
Yes, I believe so. Thanks! I was using the manpages as a reference though. I'll double check things on Sunday / Monday evening.
Ok which man pages did you look at, I will attempt to improve them also.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I went through your comments.  The seccomp.json file is the problem right now that we don't have a nice way to link to it.

:pushpin: Commit 09e8edc has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
